Deepak Aruldoss

As a dedicated Software Backend Developer with over 6 years of experience, I specialize in crafting robust and scalable backend solutions. My expertise encompasses a wide range of technologies, including Content Management Systems (CMS), Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems, and e-commerce platforms like Shopware 5 & 6. I have a proven track record of successfully integrating various payment APIs and customizing Odoo ERP to meet specific business requirements. I thrive on tackling complex technical challenges and delivering efficient solutions tailored to diverse business needs.
